name: config cascade: overrides:[{files:["**/*.test.js"]}] applies only to matching paths
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rule-engine/cli.sh" --in "$PWD/src/x.test.js" --report-format json 2>out1.json && [ "$(node -e 'console.log(JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("out1.json","utf8")).messages.length)')" = "0" ] && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rule-engine/cli.sh" --in "$PWD/src/x.js" --report-format json 2>out2.json; [ "$(node -e 'console.log(JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("out2.json","utf8")).messages.length)')" = "1" ] && echo ok 1>&2
